subcodes.first_line: Concerning Jináb-i-Áqá Músá, the utmost endeavour and effort shall be exerted. Rest ye assured that not an iota of lassitude shall [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص جناب آقا موسی نهايت سعی و کوشش خواهد گشت. مطمئن باشيد که ذرّه‌ای فتور نخواهد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @business; financial; property matters, @rejection, opposition and persecution
